person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Alain Canhiart (died 1058) was the Count of Cornouaille from 1020-1058. He was the son of Benoît de Cornouaille and the father of Hoel II, Duke of Brittany. His family name, Canhiart, is understood to be derived from the old Breton Kann Yac'h  and was translated into the Latin texts of his era as Bellator fortis.

«b»Life«/b»
According to Paul Le Baud, Alain was a descendant of Rivallon Mur Marzou and therefore was a male line descendant of the early Kings of Brittany.  As Count of Cornouaille he inherited his regnal rights from the family that appears to have ruled the Cornouaille region of Brittany from about the 10th century  His father Benoît (or Benedic) died between 1008 and 1029. He was the Count-Bishop of Cornouaille; he had been elected Bishop of Quimper circa 990 and exercised the offices jointly but kept them separated.  His mother was Guigoëdon (or Guiguoedon); she was the daughter of Orscand le Grand, the Bishop of Vannes  She was a member of the family of Alan I, King of Brittany. 

Alain became Count of Cornouaille circa 1020 when his father renounced this title. Alain's brother Orscand succeeded their father as Bishop of Cornouaille.

At one point Alain supported rebels who opposed Alan III, Duke of Brittany. Alan III prevailed and punished Count Alain by confiscating his territories, in particular Belle-Île-en-Mer. Alain returned to the Duke's good graces by facilitating his marriage to Berthe of Blois, the daughter of Count Odo; the duke allowed Alain to recover the property that had been seized that belonged to the dowry of Alain's mother.

Alain married Judith of Nantes and through her gained a claim on the County of Nantes. In part as a result of his rising power, he was attacked by Alan III but was able to push back the Duke's army in 1031 in a battle near Locronan. In this battle Alain was assisted by Saint Ronan. Alan III and Alain were again reconciled.

After this second battle with the Duke of Brittany, Alain faced difficulties with his vassals in the Viscounty of Leon, most notably Guyomarch I. Guyomarch I allied with Morvan, Viscount of Faou, to oppose Alain. Alain was successful in putting down these revolts.

Around 1029, after a serious illness, Alain founded the Abbey of Sainte-Croix of Quimperlé with the assistance of his brother Orscand, the Bishop. He included Belle-Île in his donation to the Abbey.

In 1050, at the death of his wife's nephew, Mathias I of Nantes, Alain confirmed her inheritance and his rights to rule Nantes as regent for his son Hoel, the eventual Count of Nantes.

«b»Family«/b»
Around 1026, Alain married Judith of Nantes, the daughter of Judicael of Nantes, who became the heir to the County of Nantes after the death of her nephew, Matthew, in 1050. As was the custom of the period, under the dowry arrangements Alain obtained five villages in Quistillic and half of the church of Cluthgual with the sepulcure and all appertaining rights. 

Alain and Judith had six children:
1.) Hoel II- Count of Nantes, Count of Rennes, and eventually Duke of Brittany (jure uxoris)

2.) Guérech (Quiriac) (1030-1079) - elected Bishop of Nantes in 1059, consecrated 7 January 1061

3.) Budic - died 1091

4.) Hodiern - Abbess of Locmaria de Quimper

5.) Benoît - Abbot of the Abbey of Sainte-Croix de Quimperlé in 1066, elected Bishop of Nantes in 1079, consecrated in 1081; retired in 1114 and murdered in 1115

6.) Agnes - wife of Odo I of Penthievre.

«b»Death and succession«/b»
Alain died in 1058. He was buried at Quimperle. His tomb was destroyed during the French Revolution. 

He was succeeded as Count of Cornouaille by his son Hoel.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille於1003年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉可尼利艾時，他的父親Benedict Budic VIII36歲，母親Guinodeon de Vannes23歲。他於1018年與Judith de Nantes結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1020年在法國布列塔尼被列為count of cornouaille。他去世於1058年4月13日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉享年55歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾培。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille于1003年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉可尼利艾时，他的父亲Benedict Budic VIII36岁，母亲Guinodeon de Vannes23岁。他于1018年与Judith de Nantes结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1020年在法国布列塔尼被列为count of cornouaille。他去世于1058年4月13日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉享年55岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾培。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille was born in 1003, in Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Benedict Budic VIII, was 36 and his mother, Guinodeon de Vannes, was 23. He married Judith de Nantes in 1018. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. In 1020, his occupation is listed as count of cornouaille in Brittany, France. He died on 13 April 1058, in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Quimper, Finistère, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille est né en 1003, à Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Benedict Budic VIII, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Guinodeon de Vannes, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Judith de Nantes en 1018. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. En 1020, sa profession de son indiquée est count of cornouaille à Bretagne, France. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1058, à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Quimper, Finistère, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille 1003 in Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Benedict Budic VIII 36 und seine Mutter Guinodeon de Vannes 23. Er hat 1018 Judith de Nantes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1020 ist sein Beruf als count of cornouaille in Bretagne, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. April 1058 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Quimper, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille è nato il nel 1003 nel Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Benedict Budic VIII, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Guinodeon de Vannes, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Judith de Nantes nel 1018. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1020, la sua occupazione è indicata come count of cornouaille nel Bretagne, Francia. Morì il 13 aprile 1058, nel Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Quimper, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain III Craignart de Cornouailleが1003年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインコルニルeで生まれた時，父Benedict Budic VIIIは36歳，母Guinodeon de Vannesは23歳であった。1018年にJudith de Nantesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1020年，フランスブレタグンでの職業はcount of cornouailleと記録されている。彼は1058年4月13日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインで55歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンフィニストeアクインペルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille(이)가 1003년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 코른이e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benedict Budic VIII(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Guinodeon de Vannes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1018년 Judith de Nantes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1020년, 그의 직업은 프랑스 브레타그니에서 count of cornouaille이었다. 그는 1058년 4월 13일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 키피어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille nasceu em 1003, em Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Benedict Budic VIII, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Guinodeon de Vannes, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith de Nantes em 1018. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1020, sua profissão aparece como count of cornouaille em Bretagne, França. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1058, em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Quimper, Finistère, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille родился в 1003 г. в местности корниллe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Benedict Budic VIII было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Guinodeon de Vannes, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith de Nantes в 1018 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1020 году он работал по профессии count of cornouaille в местности бретагн, Франция. Он умер 13 апреля 1058 г. в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности куимпир, финистeр, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille nació en 1003, en Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Benedict Budic VIII, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Guinodeon de Vannes, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Judith de Nantes en 1018. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1020, su ocupación registrada era count of cornouaille en Bretagne, Francia. Murió el 13 de abril de 1058, en Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Quimper, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.
